_comment: Trust core = the CRDT merge/clock/pairing logic the intent fuzzer exercises (a bug here silently corrupts a shared list). Transport/engine/status glue (transport.ts, index.ts, status.ts, crypto.ts) is DEFERRED — mostly network/timer/UI, not unit-tested here; tracked as ticket mut-grocery-list-DEFERRED-sync-glue. Survivors are a work queue, never a gate. Incremental only. See stack/stryker.md.
